name: com.lazy.advanced-scene-manager
description:
The Ultimate Unity Scene Manager!

Streamline your Unity scene management and unlock new possibilities with Advanced Scene Manager. This actively supported asset is continuously updated to provide you with the best experience, saving you valuable time and simplifying your workflows. 

A good workflow is important for healthy development. We offer a complete, organized, easy-to-use, and time-saving scene management system to assist you in every need.

_upm.changelog:
2.5.7
- Added Reopen methods callable from unity event to Scene and SceneHelper.

2.5.6
- Fixed unwrapped UnityEditor namespace in GameObjectReferenceCache.

2.5.5
- Added exception to white/black lists to prevent notification about default ASM scenes.

2.5.4
- Test disable reset scene / collection tracking upon entering play mode, using unity play button, only ASM play.
- Test disable open collection persistence via id and EditorPrefs, in favor of not resetting when entering play mode.

2.5.3
- Added option for loading screens for standalone scene bindings.
- Added option to disable input bindings for a scene or collection when specified scenes are open.

2.5.2
- Fixed issue where unimported scenes would not close if no imported scenes were also passed to SceneManager.runtime.CloseAll(..). Fixes issue where double clicking on scene assets won't work if any unimported scenes are open.

2.5.1
- Changed behaviour when duplicate scenes have been added to a collection, instead of setting previous field to null, field will instead show as red.
- Added toggle for enabling or disabling ASM auto updating build scene list.

samples.description: Includes a selection of default ASM scenes, such as loading screens, splash screens, and more, to help you get started quickly.
Setup a simple level select menu.
Setup integration with netcode for gameobjects.
